query:
SELECT 'product_categories' AS source_table, id, categoryName, brandName, subtypeCode, active, NULL AS label FROM product_categories WHERE categoryName = '耳機音響' OR brandName = 'Samsung' ORDER BY categoryName, brandName, id;
SELECT 'product_name_catalog_entries' AS source_table, id, categoryName, brandName, NULL AS subtypeCode, active, label FROM product_name_catalog_entries WHERE categoryName = '耳機音響' OR brandName = 'Samsung' ORDER BY categoryName, brandName, id LIMIT 200;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT 'product_categories' AS source_table, id, categoryName, brandName, subtypeCode, active, NULL AS label FROM product_categories WHERE categoryName = '耳機音響' OR brandName = 'Samsung' ORDER BY categoryName, brandName, id;
SELECT 'product_name_catalog_entries' AS source_table, id, categoryName, brandName, NULL AS subtypeCode, active, label FROM product_name_catalog_entries WHERE categoryName = '耳機音響' OR brandName = 'Samsung' ORDER BY categoryName, brandName, id LIMIT 200;
